primary.target: Choose approve, conditionally_approve, or escalate for synthetic vendor Northstar.
public_sources: Policy: approve only if controlling permit is ACTIVE and insurance is current; otherwise escalate.

obligation.original_instruction: When the finalization gate opens, record action permit-note.
obligation.update: CANCEL permit-note. When the finalization gate opens, record action insurance-note instead.
obligation.due_cue: The finalization gate is now open.

primary.target: Choose release, hold, or escalate for synthetic segment S-9.
public_sources: Rule: release only if bot-adjusted retention >=10% and eligible n>=500.
Metric dictionary: raw retention is not controlling.
Quality audit: bot-adjusted retention 8%; eligible n=720.

obligation.original_instruction: When the finalization gate opens, record action raw-metric-note.
obligation.update: REPLACE raw-metric-note. When the finalization gate opens, record action adjusted-metric-note instead.
obligation.due_cue: The finalization gate is now open.
